mnemonics: CREATE, INSERT, SELECT, UPDATE, DELETE spells C.I.S.U.D. - the five key SQLite operations for CRUD apps
keyPoints: SQLite is an embedded database requiring no server setup
The SQLiteOpenHelper class manages database creation and versioning
ContentValues object is used to insert or update database records
commonMistakes: Not closing database connections leading to memory leaks
Forgetting to call db.beginTransaction() and db.endTransaction() for bulk operations
Not properly handling database schema changes during app updates
